---
title: "Hypothesized Prototypes"
author: "Jeffrey Girard"
date: "2025-05-21"
format: 
  html:
    page-layout: full
    fig-width: 10
    fig-format: png
    fig-dpi: 300
embed-resources: true
---

## Setup

```{r setup}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)
library(furrr)
library(kableExtra)
library(facs) # remotes::install_github("jmgirard/facs")
library(brms)
library(easystats)

info <- read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/session_info.rds")

facs <- 
  read_rds("/mnt/datasets/SEEDLingS/2_PROCESSED/facs_coding.rds") |> 
  left_join(info) |> 
  mutate(event_id = str_c(subject, wave, facs_id, sep = "_"))

project_scheme <- scheme(
  list(
    occurrence = c(1:2, 4:39),
    intensity = c(1:2, 4:39),
    asymmetry = c(1:2, 4:39)
  )
)

protos <- 
  prototypes |> 
  filter(is.na(emotion_type) | emotion_type != "compound") |> 
  mutate(
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("anger", "angry"), "anger", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("confused", "confusion"), "confusion", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("desire", "desire food", "desire sex"), "desire", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("disgust", "disgusted"), "disgust", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("fear", "fearful"), "fear", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("happy", "happiness", "joy"), "happiness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("sad", "sadness"), "sadness", emotion),
    emotion = if_else(emotion %in% c("surprise", "surprised"), "surprise", emotion)
  )
```

```{r}
find_missing_aus <- function(proto, scheme, stringify = TRUE) {
  proto_codes <- pull_numcodes(proto)
  scheme_codes <- scheme$occurrence
  missing_aus <- setdiff(proto_codes, scheme_codes)
  if (stringify) {
    paste(missing_aus, collapse = ", ")
  } else {
    missing_aus
  }
}

find_remaining_aus <- function(proto_code, missing_aus) {
  proto_aus <- tidy(proto_code)[[1]]$occurrence
  missing_aus <- str_split(missing_aus, ", ")[[1]]
  remaining_aus <- setdiff(proto_aus, missing_aus)
  if (length(remaining_aus) > 0) {
    coding(paste(remaining_aus, collapse = "+"))
  } else {
    NA_character_
  }
}

protos2 <-
  protos |> 
  arrange(emotion, source, config_num) |> 
  mutate(
    missing_aus = map_chr(code, \(x) find_missing_aus(x, project_scheme)),
    remaining_aus = map2_chr(code, missing_aus, \(x, y) find_remaining_aus(x, y))
  ) |> 
  filter(!is.na(remaining_aus))
write_csv(protos2, "proto_summary.csv", na = "")
```

## Find Duplicated Prototypes

```{r}
protos2 |> 
  summarize(
    .by = remaining_aus,
    n_emotions = n_distinct(emotion),
    emotions = str_c(unique(emotion), collapse = ", ")
  ) |> 
  arrange(desc(n_emotions), remaining_aus) |> 
  filter(n_emotions > 1) |> 
  kbl() |> 
  kable_styling()
```

## Count Prototypes

```{r}
plan("multisession", workers = 9)
occ_counts <- 
  facs |> 
  select(-month) |> 
  mutate(
    occ = future_map_chr(facs_code, function(x) {
      codes <- tidy(coding(x))[[1]]$occurrence
      paste(codes[codes %in% project_scheme$occurrence], collapse = "+")
    }),
    occ = na_if(occ, ""),
    occ = na_if(occ, "NA"),
    occ = coding(occ)
  )
occ_counts_nested <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  nest(.by = c(occ, wave), events = c(subject, event_id, facs_duration, session_duration))
```

```{r}
merged <-
  crossing(
    occ = coding(sort(unique(c(occ_counts_nested$occ, protos2$code)))), 
    wave = c(6, 9, 12, 15)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = occ_counts_nested,
    by = join_by(occ, wave)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = protos2 |> mutate(remaining_aus = coding(remaining_aus)),
    by = join_by(occ == remaining_aus),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )
```

```{r}
proto_waves <- 
  merged |> 
  drop_na(emotion) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(emotion, wave),
    all_events = list(bind_rows(events)),
    n_protos_total = n(),
    n_protos_occur = sum(map_lgl(events, \(x) !is.null(x))),
    n_subjects = map_int(
      all_events, 
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$subject)), 0)
    ),
    n_events = map_int(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, length(unique(x$event_id)), 0)
    ),
    total_sec = map_dbl(
      all_events,
      \(x) ifelse(nrow(x) > 0, sum(distinct(x)$facs_duration), 0)
    ),
    total_pct = total_sec / sum(info$session_duration),
    total_pct_str = sprintf("%.3f%%", total_pct * 100)
  ) |> 
  arrange(emotion, wave)
kbl(
  proto_waves |> 
    select(-all_events) |> 
    mutate(emotion = str_to_title(emotion)), 
  digits = c(0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 0, 1, 4)
) |> 
  kable_styling()
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = str_to_title(emotion)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Window, y = total_pct, color = Emotion, shape = Emotion, group = Emotion)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_x_discrete() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_manual(values = scales::hue_pal()(21)) +
  scale_shape_manual(values = rep(c(21, 22, 24), length.out = 21)) +
  guides(color = guide_legend(ncol = 2), shape = guide_legend(ncol = 2)) +
  labs(x = "Age Window", y = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
       color = "Emotion Category", shape = "Emotion Category") +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("pct_window_emotion.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  filter(.by = emotion, max(total_pct) > 0) |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = str_to_title(emotion)
  ) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = Emotion, y = total_pct, fill = Window)) +
  geom_col(color = "black", linewidth = 1/4, position = position_dodge()) + 
  scale_x_discrete() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  labs(x = "Emotion Category", y = "Percentage of Video Frames", fill = "Age Window") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    legend.position = "top",
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 30, hjust = 1)
  )
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  mutate(
    Window = factor(
      wave, 
      levels = c(6, 9, 12, 15), 
      labels = c("6-8 months", "9-11 months", "12-14 months", "15-17 months")
    ),
    Emotion = fct_rev(factor(str_to_title(emotion)))
  ) |> 
  filter(total_pct > 0) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = total_pct, y = Emotion, color = Window, fill = Window, shape = Window, group = Emotion)) +
  geom_line() + 
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_fill_brewer(palette = "Set2") +
  scale_shape_manual(values = c(21, 22, 23, 24)) +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
    y = "Emotion Category",
    color = "Age Window",
    shape = "Age Window",
    fill = "Age Window"
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("emotion_pct_window.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  summarize(.by = emotion, total_pct = mean(total_pct)) |> 
  mutate(Emotion = fct_reorder(factor(str_to_title(emotion)), .x = total_pct)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x = total_pct, y = Emotion)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_discrete(drop = FALSE) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(
    x = "Percentage of Video Frames", 
    y = "Emotion Category",
  ) +
  theme_bw(base_size = 9)
ggsave("emotion_pct.png", width = 6.5, height = 4.0, units = "in", dpi = 300)
```

```{r}
proto_waves |> 
  summarize(.by = emotion, total_sec = sum(total_sec), total_pct = mean(total_pct)) |> 
  arrange(desc(total_pct)) |> 
  mutate(total_pct = scales::percent(total_pct, accuracy = 0.001)) |> 
  kbl() |> 
  kable_styling()
```

## Model Prototypes

```{r}
occ_counts_long <- 
  occ_counts |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, occ),
    occ_duration = sum(facs_duration),
    session_duration = first(session_duration)
  )
```


```{r}
merged2 <-
  crossing(
    occ = coding(sort(unique(c(occ_counts_long$occ, protos2$code)))), 
    wave = c(6, 9, 12, 15)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = occ_counts_long,
    by = join_by(occ, wave)
  ) |> 
  left_join(
    y = protos2 |> mutate(remaining_aus = coding(remaining_aus)),
    by = join_by(occ == remaining_aus),
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  )
```

```{r}
emotion_long <- 
  merged2 |> 
  filter(!is.na(emotion), !is.na(subject)) |> 
  summarize(
    .by = c(subject, wave, emotion),
    occ_duration = sum(occ_duration)
  ) |> 
  complete(subject, wave, emotion, fill = list(occ_duration = 0)) |> 
  arrange(subject, wave, emotion) |> 
  left_join(
    y = info |> select(subject, wave, session_duration),
    by = join_by(subject, wave)
  ) |> 
  mutate(pct_total = occ_duration / session_duration) |> 
  mutate(.by = emotion, m_pct = mean(pct_total, na.rm = TRUE)) |> 
  filter(m_pct >= 0.0003)
```

```{r}
describe_distribution(emotion_long, select = "pct_total") |> print_md()
ggplot(emotion_long, aes(x = pct_total)) +
  facet_wrap(~emotion, scales = "free") +
  geom_histogram(na.rm = TRUE, color = "white", bins = 30) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::percent) +
  labs(x = "Percent of Video Frames with Prototype", y = "Video Count") +
  theme_bw()
```

```{r}
emotion_wide <- 
  emotion_long |> 
  pivot_wider(
    names_from = emotion,
    values_from = pct_total,
    id_cols = c(subject, wave)
  ) |> 
  mutate(.after = wave, window = as.integer(factor(wave)) - 1)
```

```{r}
mv_linear <- brm(
  formula = bf(
    mvbind(contentment, fear, happiness, interest, sadness, surprise) ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject),
    zi ~ 1 + window + (1 + window | subject)
  ),
  family = zero_inflated_beta(link = "logit", link_phi = "log", link_zi = "logit"),
  data = emotion_wide,
  iter = 10000,
  warmup = 9000,
  chains = 3,
  cores = 3,
  refresh = 0,
  init = 0,
  file = "mv_linear",
  control = list(adapt_delta = 0.99, max_treedepth = 12),
  backend = "cmdstanr",
  threads = threading(3)
)
```

```{r}
#| warning: false

res_long <- 
  describe_posterior(mv_linear, component = "all", parameters = "window") |> 
  as_tibble() |> 
  transmute(
    Emotion = str_remove(Parameter, "b_"),
    Emotion = str_remove(Emotion, "zi_"),
    Emotion = str_remove(Emotion, "_window"),
    Component,
    Est = Median,
    CL = CI_low,
    CU = CI_high,
    pval = 1 - pd
  )
res_long |> 
  kbl(digits = c(0, 0, 2, 2, 2, 3)) |> 
  kable_styling()
```

```{r}
res_long |> 
  transmute(
    Emotion, 
    Component,
    plab = ifelse(pval < .001, "p<.001", str_glue("p={sprintf('%.3f', pval)}")),
    plab = str_replace(plab, "=0\\.", "=\\."),
    Result = sprintf("%.2f (%s)", exp(Est), plab)
  ) |> 
  select(-plab) |> 
  pivot_wider(names_from = Component, values_from = Result) |> 
  rename(OR_Conditional = conditional, OR_ZeroInflated = zero_inflated) |> 
  kbl() |> 
  kable_styling()
```

```{r}
walk(
  c("contentment", "fear", "happiness", "interest", "sadness", "surprise"),
  \(x) {
    cat('# ', x, "\n")
    print(pp_check(mv_linear, ndraws = 50, resp = x))
    cat("\n")
  }
)
```
